体.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 骨 ('bone') + phonetic 豊.

政.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 正 + semantic 攴 ('action').

美.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a person (大) wearing a feathered or ram's-horn headdress (written 羊); the ideogrammic compound reading is secondary.
美.difference: Our data classifies 美 as a compound ideograph (羊+大 semantically combined), but Wiktionary's primary classification is pictogram — a single figure with a headdress, not two independent semantic elements.

相.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 木 ('tree') + 目 ('eye') — an eye looking at a tree.

见.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 目 ('eye') + 卩 ('kneeling person').
见.difference: Our note names the lower component as 人 (person), but Wiktionary identifies it specifically as 卩 (kneeling person radical), which is the historically accurate component.

被.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 衣 ('clothing') + phonetic 皮.

利.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 禾 ('grain') + 刀 ('knife') — reaping grain with a knife.

等.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 竹 ('bamboo', referring to bamboo writing strips) + phonetic 寺.
